models.Book: The photo book being purchased — includes cover image, title, page count, and format/size details.
models.Order: A confirmed purchase of a Book. Tracks order number, pricing breakdown, shipping address, payment status, and estimated delivery.
models.ShippingAddress: The delivery destination for the order — name, street, city, state, postal code, country.
models.PaymentMethod: Credit/debit card details used for the transaction — card brand, last four digits, expiry.

confirmation.message: Your book is on its way to the printer!

errors.paymentDeclined: Your card was declined. Please check your details and try again.
errors.invalidAddress: We couldn't validate this address. Please double-check and re-enter.
errors.networkError: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
